title: E2E rebuild-determinism + corrupt-log + README trỏ
action: Demo mốc C thành test tự động per D3: chạy CLI thật (child process): init → add nhiều work có deps (kèm title unicode) → move qua đủ trạng thái với --expect → decision → đọc view; xóa .fgos/state.json → fgos rebuild → view mới deep-equal view trước khi xóa. Case corrupt: cắt cụt dòng cuối events.jsonl → lệnh đọc trả exit 5, thông điệp nêu tên lỗi. Case CAS: hai lần move với cùng --expect cũ → lần hai exit 3. README.md: thêm một dòng mục Documentation trỏ tới state layer (bin/fgos.mjs + docs/history/phase-1-state-layer/). BẮT BUỘC isolation: mọi bước e2e (kể cả case corrupt cắt cụt events.jsonl) chạy với cwd = thư mục tạm (mkdtemp) — child process không bao giờ chạy từ repo root.

truths: Rebuild từ zero ra view deep-equal qua đường CLI thật

artifacts.substantive: chạy binary thật qua child process, không mock

key_links: README.md có dòng trỏ state layer
prohibitions: Không sửa src/ để test dễ pass
Test không tạo/ghi/cắt .fgos/ trong repo — chỉ .fgos/ trong thư mục tạm

trace.outcome: Added e2e test/e2e/rebuild-determinism.test.mjs exercising the real fgos CLI via child process (mkdtemp cwd only): full journey (init, add work with deps + unicode title, move sequence with --expect through todo/doing/blocked/done, decision, delete view, rebuild -> deep-equal), CAS conflict on stale --expect (exit 3), and a truncated last event-log line (exit 5, message names the error). README.md gained one Documentation line pointing at bin/fgos.mjs + docs/history/phase-1-state-layer/. All 71 tests pass (npm test), no .fgos/ created in repo root.
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "tests_inspected": ["test/cli/fgos.test.mjs", "test/state/replay.test.mjs", "test/state/events.test.mjs"],
  "tests_added_or_changed": ["test/e2e/rebuild-determinism.test.mjs (new, 3 cases: full rebuild-determinism journey, CAS conflict, truncated-log corruption)"],
  "red_failure_evidence": "Genuinely new coverage, not a change to existing behavior: before this cell there was no automated e2e test exercising demo milestone C (plan.md Shape/C: create work -> move -> delete state.json -> fgos rebuild -> identical view) end-to-end through the real CLI binary; only the CLI-level fgos.test.mjs (cell 4) covered individual verbs. The underlying CLI/store/fsm behavior itself (bin/fgos.mjs, src/state/*) is unchanged by this cell.",
  "verification_run": "npm test -> tests 71, pass 71, fail 0 (includes the 3 new e2e tests: rebuild-determinism full journey, CAS conflict exit 3, truncated-log exit 5)",
  "deliberate_exceptions": ["No prior/red state to characterize for the new e2e file itself (see red_failure_evidence) — this is additive test coverage of an already-implemented CLI, not a behavior change to product code."]
}
